video.title: I Owe Greg Doucette an Apology
video.description:
This is Part 1 from the full Speediance/Fitness Tech workout discussion. I start with a public correction about how I heard Greg Doucette talk about Turkesterone and Anavar, why wording matters when fitness influencers discuss supplements and anabolics, and why I wanted to make that correction after the Arnold Classic.

Then I move into the Speediance/Gym Monster setup, the updated dashboard, the Pilates advertising push, and the UX bugs that keep showing up around new releases.

Full episode: https://youtu.be/GzqAzoSKBWQ

Not medical or training advice. This is personal experience and commentary; talk to qualified professionals for your own health, medication, supplements, and training decisions.

Chapters:
00:00 Arnold Classic and why this needed a correction  
01:26 Greg Doucette's older diet and anabolic content  
03:00 Asking the question in person  
04:36 Turkesterone, Anavar, and what I thought I heard  
07:28 Finding the original clip  
09:00 Public apology and influencer wording  
10:50 Speediance dashboard and Pilates ads  
13:30 UX bugs and FitHub Titan handoff  

Hashtags:
#GregDoucette #Speediance #FitnessTech
